title: XCF Global and FlyORO Sign Memorandum of Understanding to Develop Global SAF Supply Chain Solutions
content: XCF Global, Inc. and FlyORO Technologies Pte. Ltd. announced the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding. Under the MOU, XCF and FlyORO will explore the creation of a global partnership to help solve one of aviation's biggest bottlenecks: SAF supply chain and blending inefficiencies. As most blending occurs upstream at production facilities, there are limitations to flexibility and scalability. Midstream and downstream infrastructure such as terminals or airports often lack the equipment and certification processes needed for blending. Together, XCF and FlyORO intend to co-develop an end-to-end solution to enable the ready uplift of SAF. By combining XCF's expertise in SAF production infrastructure with FlyORO's patented modular blending technology - AlphaLiteâ„¢ - designed for flexible deployment either on-airport or pre-airport, the collaboration aims to support cost-effective, compliant, and scalable SAF integration into the global aviation fuel system. The urgency to deploy scalable SAF infrastructure has never been greater. By 2030, the global SAF market is projected to exceed $25 billion, with worldwide demand expected to surpass 5.5 billion gallons. As this demand accelerates, next-generation blending solutions such as FlyORO's AlphaLiteâ„¢ system, an innovative, flexible, and low-CAPEX technology, will be critical to bridging production with airports and fleets worldwide.
author: Analysts Account
